import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(line: String) -> List<Int>
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = tokens.get(i)
    match tok
    when Some(s)
      let n = string.parse_int(s)
      match n
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        # skip non-integer tokens
      end
    when None
      # skip
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn add_unique(xs: List<Int>, val: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(xs, val)
    xs
  else
    list.push(xs, val)
  end
end

fn merge_unique(a: List<Int>, b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < a.len()
    let x = a.get(i)
    match x
    when Some(v)
      result = add_unique(result, v)
    when None
      # skip
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut j = 0
  while j < b.len()
    let x = b.get(j)
    match x
    when Some(v)
      result = add_unique(result, v)
    when None
      # skip
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  result
end

fn remove_first(xs: List<Int>, val: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut skipped = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    let x = xs.get(i)
    match x
    when Some(v)
      if v == val and not skipped
        skipped = true
      else
        result = list.push(result, v)
      end
    when None
      # skip
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_list(xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    let m = list.min(remaining)
    match m
    when Some(min_val)
      sorted = list.push(sorted, min_val)
      remaining = remove_first(remaining, min_val)
    when None
      # empty list
    end
  end
  sorted
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = io.read_line()
  let line2 = io.read_line()

  let a = match line1
  when Some(l)
    parse_line(l)
  when None
    []
  end

  let b = match line2
  when Some(l)
    parse_line(l)
  when None
    []
  end

  let unique = merge_unique(a, b)
  let sorted = sort_list(unique)

  mut output = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < sorted.len()
    let x = sorted.get(i)
    match x
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        output = "#{v}"
      else
        output = "#{output} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      # skip
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(output)
end
